<thought>
I need to create a full-stack restaurant management application with 24 specific files.
I will follow the `TASK_MANAGEMENT` guidelines:
1. List all files to be created.
2. Create them in batches using `str_replace_editor` with `command="create"`.
3. Use `note` to checkpoint progress.
4. Do not verify between files.

Plan:
Batch 1: `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `next.config.js`, `prisma/schema.prisma`, `src/app/layout.tsx`, `src/app/page.tsx`, `src/app/globals.css`
Batch 2: `src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts`, `src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts`, `src/app/api/menu/route.ts`, `src/app/api/orders/route.ts`, `src/middleware.ts`, `.env.example`
Batch 3: `src/app/dashboard/page.tsx`, `src/app/menu/page.tsx`, `src/app/orders/page.tsx`, `src/app/auth/login/page.tsx`, `src/app/auth/register/page.tsx`
Batch 4: `src/lib/prisma.ts`, `src/lib/auth.ts`, `src/components/Navbar.tsx`, `src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx`, `src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx`, `src/components/OrderTable.tsx`

I will start by creating the first batch.
</thought>
